description: Perform a regulatory compliance audit on a draft shipping manifest located at ~/Desktop/draft_manifest.csv. For each of the 5 chemicals listed, verify the DOT Hazard Class by searching the CAMEO Chemicals database (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) using the UN Number. Compare the listed class against the official class using strict matching (e.g., '3' is not '3.1'). Generate an audit report at ~/Documents/manifest_audit_report.csv with columns 'UN_Number', 'Listed_Class', 'Official_Class', and 'Status'. Set 'Status' to 'PASS' for exact matches and 'FAIL' for differences. Ensure the final report includes all 5 items from the input list.
